title: BDLS — Basic Disaster Life Support
subtitle: The Ultimate Course Reviewer
edition: Based on the NDLSF BDLS v4.0 curriculum
description: A comprehensive, self-contained study reviewer for Basic Disaster Life Support. Each chapter includes a concise summary, clinical pearls, red flags, common mistakes, memory aids, decision trees, high-yield flashcards, course-style quiz questions, and realistic disaster scenarios. Built around the PRE-DISASTER and DISASTER paradigms, SALT mass-casualty triage, and the all-hazards approach for EMS providers, nurses, physicians, and public-health professionals.
prerequisites: None — BDLS is an awareness-level course; clinical background helpful

chapters.title: Disaster Medicine Foundations & the PRE-DISASTER Paradigm
Surge Capacity, Psychosocial Care & Vulnerable Populations
